title: Reverse String
description:
Given a string `s`, return the string reversed. Try to do it by swapping
characters from both ends toward the middle.

solutions.summary: Swap the outermost characters and move inward.

steps.title: Start from the function shape
steps.explanation: Begin with the signature and a default empty string.

steps.title: Work on a list of characters
steps.explanation: Strings are immutable, so swap inside a character list and join at the end.

steps.title: Place a pointer at each end
steps.explanation: `left` starts at the front, `right` at the back.

steps.title: Swap inward until they meet
steps.explanation: Exchange the two characters, then step both pointers toward the middle.

solutions.summary: Use the language’s reverse for a one-liner.

steps.title: Start from the function shape
steps.explanation: Begin with the signature and a default empty string.

steps.title: Split into characters
steps.explanation: Get the characters so we can reverse them.

steps.title: Reverse and join
steps.explanation: Reverse the characters in place and rejoin into a string.
